mapper.select: /* adm-role-rolebyusergroup-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstRo */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,ROKEY ,RONM FROM TADMIN_MST_RO

/* adm-role-rolebyusergroup-sql-oracle.xml - selectRoleByUserGroup */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,URGRXROGT.ROKEY AS ROKEY ,RO.RONM AS RONM ,URGRXROGT.URGRKEY AS URGRKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_URGRXROGT URGRXROGT INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_RO RO ON URGRXROGT.ROKEY = RO.ROKEY WHERE URGRXROGT.URGRKEY = #{urgrkey}
